title: schradera exotica
intro: Schradera exotica, also known as the "Bitter Apple" or "Monkey Bitter Apple", is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Schradera exotica include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent such as ethanol.
